2604.13756.title: MedRCube: A Multidimensional Framework for Fine-Grained and In-Depth Evaluation of MLLMs in Medical Imaging
2604.13756.paper_summary: The potential of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) in domain of medical imaging raise the demands of systematic and rigorous evaluation frameworks that are aligned with the real-world medical imaging practice. Existing practices that report single or coarse-grained metrics are lack the granularity required for specialized clinical support and fail to assess the reliability of reasoning mechanisms. To address this, we propose a paradigm shift toward multidimensional, fine-grained and in-depth evaluation. Based on a two-stage systematic construction pipeline designed for this paradigm, we instantiate it with MedRCube. We benchmark 33 MLLMs, \textit{Lingshu-32B} achieve top-tier performance. Crucially, MedRCube exposes a series of pronounced insights inaccessible under prior evaluation settings. Furthermore, we introduce a credibility evaluation subset to quantify reasoning credibility, uncover a highly significant positive association between shortcut behavior and diagnostic task performance, raising concerns for clinically trustworthy deployment. The resources of this work can be found at https://github.com/F1mc/MedRCube.
2604.13756.paper_summary_zh: 多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）在醫學影像領域的潛力提高了與現實醫學影像實踐相一致的系統性和嚴謹評估框架的需求。現有的實踐報告單一或粗略的指標，缺乏專業臨床支持所需的細緻度，並未能評估推理機制的可靠性。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了一種向多維、細緻和深入評估的範式轉變。基於為這一範式設計的兩階段系統構建管道，我們用 MedRCube 進行實例化。我們對 33 個 MLLMs 進行基準測試，\textit{Lingshu-32B} 表現出色。至關重要的是，MedRCube 揭示了一系列在之前的評估設置下無法獲得的顯著見解。此外，我們引入了一個可信度評估子集，以量化推理的可信度，發現捷徑行為與診斷任務表現之間存在高度顯著的正相關，這引發了對臨床可信部署的擔憂。本工作的資源可以在 https://github.com/F1mc/MedRCube 找到。
2604.13756.author: Zhijie Bao et.al.
2604.13756.authors: Zhijie Bao, Fangke Chen, Licheng Bao, Chenhui Zhang, Wei Chen, Jiajie Peng, Zhongyu Wei
